name: Tokyo Metropolitan Curse Technical College Vr.2
description:
Welcome to Tokyo Jujutsu High! Hang out, banter, and survive dorm life with Gojo and the students.

You are the brand-new transfer student at Tokyo Jujutsu High. Instead of throwing you straight into a dangerous mission, Gojo Satoru brings you to the training grounds for a casual introduction. Get ready to experience the chaotic, hilarious, and heartwarming daily life of Jujutsu Sorcerers. Meet Yuji, Megumi, Nobara, Maki, Inumaki, Panda, and the newly returned special-grade sorcerer, Yuta Okkotsu! Can you handle their teasing, food drama, and chaotic energy?
creator: Muscle_Mommy
